verificationNote: AI-generated Statement of Applicability template for ISO 27001:2022. Organizations must complete this based on their own risk assessment and ISMS scope.
title: Statement of Applicability (SoA) Template
description: Template for documenting the applicability of ISO 27001:2022 Annex A controls, with justifications for inclusion and exclusion.
instructions: For each Annex A control, document whether it is applicable, the justification for inclusion or exclusion, the implementation status, and any relevant notes. The SoA is a mandatory deliverable for ISO 27001 certification.

fields.name: controlName
fields.description: Name of the Annex A control

fields.name: theme
fields.description: Control theme: Organizational, People, Physical, Technological

fields.name: applicable
fields.description: Whether the control is applicable to the ISMS scope

fields.name: justification
fields.description: Justification for inclusion or exclusion of the control

fields.name: implementationMethod
fields.description: How the control is implemented (policy, procedure, technology, etc.)

fields.name: riskTreatmentRef
fields.description: Reference to risk treatment plan if applicable

sampleEntries.justification: Required by ISMS scope — information security policies are fundamental to the management system.
sampleEntries.implementationMethod: Information Security Policy Framework document approved by CEO, reviewed annually.

sampleEntries.justification: Organization operates secure areas including data centre and key management facility.
sampleEntries.implementationMethod: Secure area access procedures, supervision requirements, and recording device restrictions.
sampleEntries.notes: Applies to data centre and key management room.

sampleEntries.justification: Organization does not use production data in non-production environments — synthetic data generation is used instead.
sampleEntries.notes: Re-evaluate if data usage practices change.
